g.title: control_plane
g.text: Figure 2 · Control-plane interposition at the tool-call boundary — v1.0 RC
at PreToolUse; Pillar 1 selects a blueprint and Layers 2–4 + BP-D validators admit or reject.
PASS stamps a correlation id; Pillar 2 hash-chains the decision; Pillar 3 surfaces active guidance on the next op.
